creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Bugzilla has this handy "preview" feature to check if one's bug description or comment will be rendered as expected.  However, it only works for me when adding comments to existing bugs, but not when filing description for the new bug (like this text itself, for instance).  When I click "Preview" tab, it briefly says "Generating Preview..." as it usually does, yet the result is empty.

I observe this on various browsers and engines, e.g. with Firefox ESR 52.4.0 and Falkon 3.1.0.  I don't know if this is common Bugz' problem or specific to our particular installation of it.
